title: Kadenicarpus horripilus

This plant is part of the genus Kadenicarpus, which is a group of cacti native to the Americas. The classification of Kadenicarpus horripilus is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Angiospermophyta. The classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other cacti.
